title: The Puppet Company - Finger Puppets - Giraffe PC020201
features: One of over 150 different finger puppets!
Finger access is located in the base of the puppet.
Other finger puppets in the range include puppets to go with stories, rhymes and songs as well as animals/creatures from the farm, woodland, jungle, air and sea.
Suitable for children aged 12 months and above.
description: From the brand Welcome to The Puppet Company We are a family-run business that's been crafting magic for over 23 years, and proud to be one of the world's leading puppet suppliers. Previous page Some of our most popular items Visit the store The Puppet Company was founded in 1999 by husband-and-wife team Sue and Peter Lockey with the aim to offer the largest range of puppets available anywhere. With 30+ years of teaching experience between them, their passion for puppetry comes from knowing the simple joy a puppet can bring. Our puppets capture the essence of a fine toy, inspiring creativity, entertainment, and, most importantly, fun! Are our products high quality? Safety is our top priority, and we take pride in using high-quality materials, rigorous manufacturing processes, and thorough product testing. All of our products carry both the CE and UKCA safety marks. What's our aim? Our mission is to promote creative play, encouraging children and adults alike to tell stories, ignite their imagination, and bring smiles to people’s faces. What makes our products special? We continuously develop exciting and imaginative products, featuring popular animals and characters, inspiring creative play and sparking imagination. Next page
